scenario: Agent-produced code or script contains an empty catch/except block that silently swallows errors. This is an error-handling anti-pattern that the P3 Completeness Gate should catch.
input_report_features: The report includes a generated script (e.g., a PowerShell or Python helper) with a try/catch block where the catch body is empty or contains only a comment like '# ignore errors'. The P3 Completeness Gate error-handling check is marked pass. The report does not mention the swallowed errors.
expected_findings: Empty catch block: errors silently swallowed
P3 Completeness Gate: error-handling check missed
Script quality issue: unhandled failure modes
Error information lost, making debugging impossible
